messages.content:
Eres un experto en el codebase de ProjectSight (Trimble Construction).
El proyecto usa .NET/C# en el backend con ASP.NET MVC/Razor y Angular en el frontend.

Reglas críticas del proyecto (nunca las violes):
- Backend: Nunca uses ORM (Entity Framework, Dapper). Solo IDBHelper con stored procedures por nombre.
- Backend: Toda operación de BD va a través de stored procedures nombrados. Jamás inline SQL.
- Frontend: Nunca uses Angular HttpClient. Usa RxJS ajax() via APIBase / APIFactory.
- Frontend: Usa DestroyRef + subscribeTo() para subscriptions, NO Subscription arrays manuales.
- Frontend: Nunca hardcodees colores hex. Usa variables CSS de Default.css.
- No edites delta_procs.sql directamente; se genera automáticamente desde base_procs.sql.
- Agregar o quitar [UseInAPI] en una propiedad dispara APIClientComponentGenerator al compilar.

Cuando implementes cambios, sigue el patrón exacto del diff que se te proporciona.

```diff
diff --git a/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/GainsightSystem.cs b/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/GainsightSystem.cs
index 9878b462869..2ff7a0e1995 100644
--- a/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/GainsightSystem.cs	
+++ b/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/GainsightSystem.cs	
@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@ public class GainsightSystem : SystemBase
         public GainsightSettings GetGainsightSettings(IRequestedBy requestedBy)
         {
             GainsightSettings settings = null;
+
             try
             {
                 settings = new GainsightSettings(Configuration.GetExternalService(ExternalService.Types.GainsightKey));
@@ -30,7 +31,7 @@ public GainsightSettings GetGainsightSettings(IRequestedBy requestedBy)
                 {
                     settings.UserInfo = GenerateUserInfo(requestedBy);
                     settings.AccountInfo = new GainsightAccountInfo(requestedBy);
-                    settings.GlobalContext = GenerateGlobalContext(requestedBy);
+                    settings.GlobalContext = GenerateGlobalContext(requestedBy, settings.Region);
                 }
             }
             catch (Exception ex)
@@ -85,13 +86,13 @@ public GainsightUserInfo GenerateUserInfo(IRequestedBy requestedBy)
         /// </summary>
         /// <returns></returns>
         [NotNull]
-        private GainsightGlobalContext GenerateGlobalContext(IRequestedBy requestedBy)
+        private GainsightGlobalContext GenerateGlobalContext(IRequestedBy requestedBy, string region)
         {
             // Exceptions are handled by the caller
 
             using (var portfolioDB = requestedBy.ProjectID != 0 ? _dbHelperFactory.NewDBHelperPortfolio(requestedBy, requestedBy.ProjectID) : null)
             {
-                return GenerateGlobalContext(portfolioDB, requestedBy);
+                return GenerateGlobalContext(portfolioDB, requestedBy, region);
             }
         }
 
@@ -100,7 +101,7 @@ private GainsightGlobalContext GenerateGlobalContext(IRequestedBy requestedBy)
         /// </summary>
         /// <returns></returns>
         [NotNull]
-        public GainsightGlobalContext GenerateGlobalContext(IDBHelper portfolioDB, IRequestedBy requestedBy)
+        public GainsightGlobalContext GenerateGlobalContext(IDBHelper portfolioDB, IRequestedBy requestedBy, string region)
         {
             // Exceptions are handled by the caller
 
@@ -121,7 +122,7 @@ public GainsightGlobalContext GenerateGlobalContext(IDBHelper portfolioDB, IRequ
                 }
             }
 
-            return new GainsightGlobalContext(requestedBy, project);
+            return new GainsightGlobalContext(requestedBy, project, region);
         }
     }
 }

                 var groups = new UserGroupSystem().GetUserGroupsForMobile(portfolioDB, new ErrorEncountered());
                 result.UserGroups = groups.Select(g => new MobileUserGroup(g));
 
-                var context = gainsight.GenerateGlobalContext(portfolioDB, requestedBy);
+                var context = gainsight.GenerateGlobalContext(portfolioDB, requestedBy, GainsightSettings.FOR_SYNC);
 
                 if (requestedBy.ProjectID > 0)
                 {
diff --git a/Core/Common/Components/Gainsight/GainsightGlobalContext.cs b/Core/Common/Components/Gainsight/GainsightGlobalContext.cs
index 302374dad2a..20e11d7efa1 100644
--- a/Core/Common/Components/Gainsight/GainsightGlobalContext.cs
+++ b/C

[... truncado 5512 chars ...]

ault constraints */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.s_util_drop_default') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+/****** Object: Stored Procedure s_util_drop_default ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+  @table_name     sysname ,
+  @column_name    sysname ,
+  @no_message     bit = 0
+AS
+DECLARE
+  @default_name   sysname ,
+  @table_id       int
+
+  SELECT @default_name = s.name
+    FROM (syscolumns sc INNER JOIN sysobjects s ON sc.cdefault = s.id)
+         INNER JOIN sysobjects pt ON sc.id = pt.id
+   WHERE sc.name = @column_name
+     AND pt.name = @table_name
+
+  IF @default_name IS NOT NULL
+    BEGIN
+      IF @no_message = 0
+        PRINT 'Dropping constraint ' + @default_name + ' from table ' + @table_name
+
+      EXEC('ALTER TABLE dbo.' + @table_name + ' DROP CONSTRAINT ' + @default_name)
+    END
+GO
+
+  /* Add a utility proc for getting the current environment */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.fn_util_get_env') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env
+GO
+/****** Object: Function fn_util_get_env ******/
+CREATE FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env() RETURNS NVARCHAR(100)
+AS
+BEGIN
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+
+  SELECT @environment =
+    CASE Environment
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prod' THEN 'na'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodeu' THEN 'eu'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodau' THEN 'au'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-produk' THEN 'uk'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-ps-gvi-p-sql-0' THEN 'hp'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea1' THEN 'fea1'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea2' THEN 'fea2'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea3' THEN 'fea3'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea4' THEN 'fea4'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-UAT' THEN 'fea5'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea6' THEN 'fea6'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-qa' THEN 'qa'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-performance' THEN 'performance'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-staging' THEN 'staging'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-labs' THEN 'labs'
+    ELSE CASE WHEN TIDCallbackURL like 'http://localhost%' THEN 'localhost' ELSE 'other' END
+    END
+    FROM Control
+
+  RETURN @environment
+END
+GO
+
+IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#update') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP TABLE #update
+GO
+CREATE TABLE #update
+(
+    update_data          BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
+)
+GO
+DELETE FROM #update
+INSERT INTO #update VALUES(0)
+GO
+
+/******************************** BEGINNING OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+SELECT @environment = dbo.fn_util_get_env()
+
+UPDATE ExternalService 
+   SET ParametersJson = '{"Region":"' + UPPER(@environment) + '"}'
+WHERE Type = 201 -- GainSight - Tracking Key
+  AND (ParametersJson IS NULL OR ParametersJson = '');
+
+/******************************** END OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  Start ***************************/
+
+SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER OFF
+GO
+
+-- DB VERSION NUMBER
+-- ## UPDATE versions set major = $major, minor = $minor, revision = 0 where program_id = 'Core DB'
+--UPDATE versions set major = 10, minor = 85, revision = 0 where program_id = 'Core DB'
+GO
+DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  End  ****************************/
+

-bin\Google.OrTools.dll
 bin\Google.Protobuf.dll
 bin\Grpc.Auth.dll
 bin\Grpc.Core.Api.dll
@@ -50,7 +49,6 @@ bin\Microsoft.IdentityModel.JsonWebTokens.dll
 bin\Microsoft.IdentityModel.Logging.dll
 bin\Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens.dll
 bin\Microsoft.IO.RecyclableMemoryStream.dll
-bin\Microsoft.Net.Http.Headers.dll
 bin\Microsoft.Solver.Foundation.dll
```
